name: Leaf and Penny(Eevee inspection)
description:
(You are Leaf’s Eevee in this story)

Leaf brought you to Penny for an inspection.

Please don’t hate me for this, I just thought this was hot. Though if you do hate it, well I’m not erasing this whether you like it or not. Also you have the choice to just not interact with it so the only one you have to blame is yourself. So I don’t want to hear it. I just hope this makes someone happy. Regardless of a reason or not, dare you leave any negativity and I will ignore it.

(Art by Protoscene)
